entry.title: MB90 It does not replicate on the first attempt IDOC MBGMCR03
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a problem, when executing transaction MB90, I notice that, if you stay on the next screen after the execution, the IDoc always remains in state 30.

IDoc in status 30:

I have noticed that to resolve this issue, it is necessary to remain on the initial screen of transaction MB90

And the IDoc changes its status to successful.

My question is: Is this the standard behavior of the transaction?

Note: I have stayed on this screen for more than 20 minutes, and the IDoc has always been in status 30, but when I went back, the status changed. I have tried the scenario several times, and it only works when I go back.

I also have a background job running, but it only processes the IDoc when I go back to the initial MB90 screen

Could you please help me determine if this is standard behavior, or what it might be due to? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Unrestricted stock in storage locations for maintenance orders using fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello David,
If you are talking about Spare Parts Consumption (movement 261) check out the Fiori App 'Perform Maintenance Jobs'.
Once work order is planned, spare parts are assigned - you can book consumption there, and if there is no stock - u got an error straight in the app.

However, if you mean, that you want to see the unrestricted stock during planning, during spare parts assignment - most probably u need a small development.
On the other side it's a bit tricky. 
It's not about planning work and using spare parts which are on the stock.
It's about assigning the right spare parts, and if there is no stock - buying them.

Have a look at the app and let me know what u think.
Cheers,
Dan

entry.title: Re: Linking Workflow Task ( SBWP Inbox) to Fiori Inbox
entry.content: hello @ParagMahajan , were you able to find the guide?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Production Order Creation Fails Due to Invali...
entry.content: Not really, did you?

entry.title: Driving Business Process Transformation through Innovation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are thrilled to introduce SAP Signavio Lab Space, an innovative cloud-based solution designed to empower businesses to stay ahead of the curve in process transformation. This dedicated platform offers companies the opportunity to discover and experiment with SAP Signavio's ongoing innovation initiatives in a risk-free environment.

What's in it for the Customer?

SAP Signavio Lab Space is accessible to new and existing customers of Process Manager and offers accelerated access to beta features. By exploring ongoing innovation projects within SAP Signavio Lab Space, customers can gain insights into the latest developments and easily upload and test their own data in a risk-free environment, empowering users to sample and shape future innovations.

Why SAP Signavio Lab Space?

Here are the key reasons why businesses should leverage SAP Signavio Lab Space to propel their process management initiatives forward:

  1. Discover Ongoing Innovation Projects: Unlock the potential of a centralized platform that provides updates and insight into ongoing innovation projects. Access a repository of emerging concepts to stay ahead of the curve in a risk-free environment for experimentation.
  2. Validate Innovations with Your Own Data: Upload and test your own datasets to witness firsthand how your data can drive innovation and improvement within your specific business context.
  3. Help Shape Our Roadmap: Execute and manage improvement initiatives efficiently and quantify the delivered value of improvement initiatives. 

How to Access SAP Signavio Lab Space?

Users with an SAP Signavio Enterprise or Enterprise Plus license can access SAP Signavio Lab Space. To get limited free access to beta features, interested parties can contact us at signavio_lab_space@sap.com.

Check out the overview video for SAP Signavio Lab Space here!

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content: thank you very much, it is very helpful! However, I would like to take this opportunity to ask you. In the first comment of that post it talks about a “start to finish guide” but the link does not work. Would you know if there is any official sap information regarding this topic? Since I need to be able to back up this information by sap.

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content: thank you very much!

entry.title: TIH upgrade impacts on other areas
entry.content:
Has anyone upgraded their systems with TIH which impacted other modules? Specifically with the use of different competency libraries which were being utilized for specific forms. Ex- there are set of competencies which are captured only in a 360 form and shouldn't be available otherwise. Can this be still the case if employees are enabled to add competencies from attribute library? Creating custom elements is an option but they will not be available in the detailed report. Any workarounds are welcome.

Thanks!

entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can someone please help me on this.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Kinza Awan, and I am from Pakistan. I have recently embarked on my learning journey , and I would love for you to review the attached screenshot of my progress.

As I am new to the SAP field, I am eager to advance my career with a Global Certification. Could you kindly guide me on the process and any relevant details regarding SAP Global Certification?

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Kinza Awan

entry.title: Disable or remove permissions for the Introductory Text on People Profile
entry.content: Will an option be provided to remove permissions or disable/hide the Introductory Text on the People Profile?

entry.title: CIG Mapping For Additional Partner Function in cXML Order Request.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Seeking some support on CIG mapping for the cXML Order Request.
Client wants to display multiple Partner Function details (LF, GS, PI, OA, RE, WE) in Ariba Network PO.
We are able to capture the partner functions in the PO Idoc, but in CIG we are unable to map them to relevant Contact Roles. Even after mapping, the data is not showing in the Target structure.
 any pointer on its mapping.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: error " file NOT found! "when doing a test service in...
Re: error " file NOT found! "when doing a test service in...
entry.content: Hi Maximo we are facing similar issue while testing the deployed app, please suggest the solution if you got. Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: How to get the details of the Tools accessing HANA Models
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to know the best way to know the details of the external tools like Power BI , Tableau etc which are accessing the HANA models/BW Models actively.

I assume if any BW Models is being accessed externally , their details will be captured in the statistic tables/cubes with that we can confirm if any tools are actively calling any BW objects based on application User names.

How can we confirm the same for HANA Models/Tables in the HANA DB? Is there any way to get those usage statistics ?

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Missing a Fiori app in our system
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to launch the Fiori app "Analyze Stock in Date Range" but I am getting nothing! Pls. let us know do we need to activate it / something? If so, pls. let us know how to activate it?

Our system BASIS and UI is 757 and S/4 2022 HANA

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 1: Introduction to SAP Business AI
entry.content: Nice blog ! Thanks, Raja.

entry.title: Product Availability Check: storage location
entry.content:
Hello,

We have the scenario regarding the MRP Area in our industry:

Outside the area, we have three storage locations: the Storage location with supplies for production (ROH), the Storage location for the production of HALB and FERT, and the Storage location for sales, where we have imported goods (HAWA) and FERT. We configured it this way so that these warehouses have visibility of all the requirements and can generate planned orders and requisitions correctly. Inside the area, there are the Storage locations that are not used for sales (warranty, discard...).

The issue is that some HAWA items we sell are also used in production as raw material for FERT, and the balance of this HAWA in production sometimes doesn’t have a production order attached and ends up being sold. Is there a way to restrict the ATP and sales view to the sales warehouse only? Or is there a better suggestion for a solution?

entry.title: Re: ABAP & XML
entry.content: You'll have to read and train a lot then. Search the blog posts and ABAP documentation about "XML transformation". Converting an ABAP variable to an XML string is called "serialization", the reverse is called "deserialization".

entry.title: Re: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content: Please use the buttons "..." and "</>" to display your code nicely. See how to do it here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-post-code-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684774

entry.title: Re: error " file NOT found! "when doing a test service in...
entry.content: Hello @AnkurNashikkar . In my case the error was that the application was wrongly transferred from DEV to QAS. So I had to switch back the application and the OData service and reactivate everything from scratch. I hope this information helps you.

entry.title: Re: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content: For x-csrf-token, you need one requests to "fetch" the x-csrf-token, then you can do the next requests by initializing the header field x-csrf-token. It's clear that your code is incomplete, why are you not passing any token to "set_csrf_token"?

entry.title: SAP PI Mapping help: Duplicate Idoc - continue Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you help with the below issue related to PI mapping logic.

Requirement: Source file structure
Target IDoc
in the current design: Target Idoc node is duplicated for a flag field and additional Idocs are generated.
Eg:
I have 3 employee ID's 2247,2799,5832
2247 has 3 records -> 3 Idocs are generated and It has a field flag as Y for two records, so additional 2 idocs are generated
2799 - 1 record -> 1 Idoc is generated with flag as N
5832 - 2 records -> 2 Idocs are generated It has a field flag as Y for one record, so additional 1 idoc is generated

So in total 3 + 2 + 1 + 2 + 1 = 9 Idocs are generated.

In the target Structure, there is a field Record_Seq which has the values as
These Idocs are generated by the 1st Occurance of Idoc node
2247_01
2247_02
2247_03
2799_01
5832_01
5832_02


As I mention earlier, Idoc node is duplicated where Additional Idocs are generated based on Flag Y,  sequence is as below
2247_01
2247_01
5832_01
5832_01

Expected Sequence in the Above Idocs is

2247_04
2247_05
5832_03
5832_04
Basically, I want to continue Idoc sequence in the 2nd Idoc node occurence, please advise how to achieve it

entry.title: Re: Introducing OpenUI5 2.x
entry.content:
Hello Oliver,

I tried pointing my UI5 app bootstrap to https://sdk.openui5.org/nightly/2/resources/sap-ui-core.js but it's throwing exception.

This is my index.html looks like this.

Spoiler
<script
     id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
     src="https://sdk.openui5.org/nightly/2/resources/sap-ui-core.js"
     data-sap-ui-theme="sap_horizon"
     data-sap-ui-libs="sap.m"
     data-sap-ui-async="true"
     data-sap-ui-compatVersion="edge"
     data-sap-ui-language="en"
     data-sap-ui-bindingSyntax="complex"
     data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{
          "com.sap.platformx": "../"
      }'
     data-sap-ui-frameOptions='deny'
>
</script>

Please help me here.

BR,

Azhar

entry.title: Re: Hide the "post on account " tab in post outgoing payments .

Also, not sure what does "scripts option is not there for this screen" mean. Do you not have the 'Scripts' option in flavor Manager, but you can edit the screen itself? And why would you need scripting to hide a tab?

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: How to check if the changes from the adaptation project are active?
entry.content: Same here. No Flexibility panel.

entry.title: Re: My inbox does not auto refresh after purchase request approval SAP 19.09 FIORI S/4 HANA
entry.content: Try to apply this SNOTE 2534176 - Refresh of Worklist once Purchase Requisition is approved from My Inbox.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How do I filter items in a list of items?
entry.content:
When you select an AREA from the simple property collection, MDK will set the default binding object for the next page to be the selected AREA record.  Since your AREA record has a navigation property to EQUIPOS you can just set the target of your list to be based on the readLink and nav property.

{@odata.readLink}/EQUIPOS

 This should then just display the EQUIPOS associated to the AREA assuming the Nav Property is properly filtering.

entry.title: Exchange among SAP Experts: What do you wish you had known earlier?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As someone relatively new to the SAP ecosystem, I’m curious to hear what insights or advice would have been helpful for you at the start of your SAP journey. I believe this would be a great opportunity for us to connect, share our experiences, and learn from each other. What key information or best practices do you wish you had known earlier?

Let’s start a conversation and grow together.

Kind regards

Jerry

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content: I haven't been able to find any official documentation to help you support the thesis, and the link shared in the blog post appears to be expired. However, based on my experience, I've observed that the Fiori My Inbox app and the SAP GUI transaction code /nSBWP are often used interchangeably. To confirm this, it would be helpful to consult an SAP MM functional consultant, as they frequently use these tools in the context of MM/Procurement.

entry.content:

Did you manage to have a successful connection test? Did you use basic authentication with your email and password? Did you activate the SSL connection and imported the certificate in STRUST?

entry.title: External service agreement learning only user IAS requirement after native login deprecation
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to onboard external service agreement personnel before the release 2H2024 for only SuccessFactors learning system, these users will exist as functional learning only users, who will not need login access to SuccessFactors learning (Training administrator manually assigning Instructor led courses and adding completions for these users).

I am having questions as can you please help me to answer.

Questions:

1. Do we need to migrate these users to IAS before the second half of 2024? 

2. Can we enable new learning experiences(ILX) if training admins manage course assignments and completions?

3. Is IAS required for these users? What happens if we don’t use IAS for them after the first half of 2025?

FYI, we are using only SF platform user as internal for these users IAS activated.

entry.title: Re: ¿Qué pasa en Soporte SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hola @Lili-LATAM 

Gracias por tu comentario.

Podemos ver que el título de nuestro post es algo confuso. Una disculpa. Sin embargo, desde nuestra posición de soporte, no nos es posible comunicar acerca del futuro del producto. En este caso, te sugerimos darle seguimiento al Product Road Map para próximos anuncios. 

Saludos cordiales.

entry.title: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?
entry.content:
Hi NSQ community,

@jimjaquet @craigcmehil and I are in town next week and would love to hang out with you. During planning the upcoming the week we decided that Thursday, September 26 would be great for a SAP Community Meetup. Before I officially post a event though, I quickly wanted to see who of you would be coming on Thursday night. Also, could you help me suggesting what would be a good place to go to? I only know MOD Pizza, I've heard about UNO Pizzeria & Grill as well, but I'm basically open for any suggestions. 

I'm excited to come back to NSQ after 5 years 🙂

@StephanieMarley @jerryjanda @caseydevlin @seanlavelle @johna69 @Kartik_Dua @GoLaSalle @caroleighdeneen @RichHeilman @josh_bentley @leeclemmer

entry.title: Re: ABAP & XML
entry.content:
Thank you, @Sandra_Rossi !  This morning I've already come across @Joris blog from 2019 about XSLT transformations and I have his example working.  I also saw your add-on post about simple transformations which is great information.  I agree, I have a lot to learn quickly!

Thank you for mentioning serialization and deserialization.  THAT'S the stuff I don't know to look up!!!

entry.title: Re: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?
entry.content: count me in.  both are good, close options.  there is also pj whelihans (sports bar) (https://locations.pjspub.com/pa/newtown-square/4803-west-chester-pike) and teca (italian)  (https://www.tecanewtownsquare.com/). look forward to catching up.  @seanlavelle

entry.title: Re: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?
entry.content: Sounds great! There are several good restaurants very close to the office. Our first meetup was at Pizzeria Uno (which you mentioned -- it's across the street from the SAP campus), and the second was at Firepoint Grill (right down the road). I'm not picky though, so I'll defer to someone who has a preference.

entry.title: How to migrate Open PR data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We're in need of migrating open PR (Purchase Requisition) data from one of our tenants to another in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.

After searching for a desirable Migration Object in the Migration Cockpit though, we couldn't find any open PR objects to upload this data in the app. With this in mind, we'd like to know:

  • What are our options or alternatives to migrate open PR data/information to our system?

Thanks,
Data Migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to migrate Open PR data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Publ...
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Indeed, there's no Migration Object for your business requirement in the Migration Cockpit, which is a standard/expected behavior of the system, further explained by the KBA 3411702:

  • Since PR is an internal transactional document, there is no app or Migration Object available to create mass Purchase Requisitions.

The alternative to mass migrate your open PR data/information is also explained by the KBA:

  • The API CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 can be used to create Purchase Requisitions (...)

More information about this solution can be found in the KBA and Hub link below:

  • 3411702 - Mass creation of Purchase Requisition
  • Purchase Requisition API Hub

Good luck with the data migration of the Purchase Requisitions!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Message tranform bean creating empty payload
entry.content: We have some xml conversions not working after SP29 as well. Hopefully someone can provide some help.

entry.title: Re: SAP BO 4.2 SP05: Windows Server OS Upgrade From 2008...
entry.content: With our plan of building new server and the BO 4.3 platform, we would like to install SQL Server 2022 in place of SQL Anywhere. Is it possible to migrate all the repository content, including the CMS and audit databases, from SQL Anywhere to SQL Server 2022?

entry.title: Re: Exciting news for SAP SuccessFactors Learning in 2H2023: the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Will the search on new home page be fixed so that it will return courses that are just added immediately instead of having an unknown length delay?  Many companies have voted and posted influence ideas on this and so far we are not getting any response? 

Can we please make sure the search on new home page be fixed before the old home page is decommissioned as this is vital to business operations.  Thanks.

entry.title: Elevatus Assessment Integration with SuccessFactors Recruitment: Revolutionizing Talent Acquisition
entry.content:
In today’s competitive job market, finding and hiring the right talent is more critical than ever. Organizations are increasingly turning to advanced technologies to streamline their recruitment processes to meet these demands. One such powerful integration that is making waves is the Elevatus Assessment integration with SuccessFactors Recruitment. This integration promises to enhance the recruitment process by providing a seamless, efficient, and comprehensive assessment experience for both recruiters and candidates.

What is Elevatus?

Elevatus is a cutting-edge assessment platform designed to help organizations evaluate candidates more effectively. It offers a wide range of assessment tools, including cognitive ability tests, personality assessments, skill evaluations, and more. Elevatus leverages AI-driven insights to deliver detailed candidate profiles, helping recruiters make more informed hiring decisions.

Seamless Integration for Enhanced Recruitment

The integration of Elevatus Assessment with SuccessFactors Recruitment is a game changer for several reasons:

1. Streamlined Workflow

The integration ensures a seamless workflow between Elevatus and SuccessFactors Recruitment. Recruiters can now send assessment invitations directly from SuccessFactors, track candidate progress, and view assessment results without switching between platforms. This not only saves time but also reduces the chances of errors and inconsistencies.

2. Comprehensive Candidate Profiles

Elevatus provides in-depth candidate profiles that include assessment results, behavioral insights, and skill evaluations. These profiles are automatically synced with SuccessFactors Recruitment, giving recruiters a 360-degree view of each candidate. This comprehensive data empowers recruiters to make data-driven decisions and select the best fit for their organization.

3. Enhanced Candidate Experience

Candidates benefit from a smooth and engaging assessment process. They can complete assessments within the same application they use for their job application, resulting in a consistent and user-friendly experience. The integration also allows for timely feedback, keeping candidates informed and engaged throughout the process.

4. Improved Decision-Making

With detailed insights from Elevatus assessments, recruiters can better understand a candidate’s strengths, weaknesses, and potential fit for the role. This data-driven approach reduces bias and enhances the quality of hire. Moreover, the integration with SuccessFactors’ analytics tools enables organizations to track and measure the effectiveness of their assessment strategies.

5. Scalability and Flexibility

The integration is highly scalable, accommodating organizations of all sizes. Whether you are a small business or a large enterprise, the Elevatus and SuccessFactors integration can be tailored to meet your unique recruitment needs. The platform's flexibility allows for customization, ensuring that the assessment process aligns with your organizational goals and values.

Getting Started with the Integration

Implementing the Elevatus Assessment integration with SuccessFactors Recruitment is straightforward. Here’s a step-by-step guide to get you started:

1- Enable the below options from provisioning under company settings:

  • Enable Assessment Integration
  • SFAPI
  • Enable SFAPI Webservices

2- Go to Elevatus>Integrations>from the SuccessFactors Box>Click on connect and fill in the required information.

3- From the credentials tab, get the API key and API secret key generated from Evevatus. The same values will be used in Event notification subscribers in SuccessFactors.

4- Go to Event notification subscriber under SuccessFactors.

5- From the Subscriber tab, click Edit Subscriber to add or edit the Subscriber.

6- Go to the External Event Tab and update the below information:

  • Select the event type as “rcm_assessment_alert_v2”
  • Select a subscriber
  • Choose protocol “SOAP_OVER_HTTP_HTTPS”
  • Add the endpoint URL from Elevatus
  • Choose Authentication: client_credential
  • Add the client ID (API Key) the client secret (API Secret) and the token endpoint
    generated by Elevatus.

7- Create a new user for the integration or use the existing SFAPI user.

  • Create an API integration user
    SuccessFactors → Manage API option profile
  • Go to Manage Permission Role>Recruiting Permissions>Grant the SFAPI Retrieve Assessment Order permission to the SFAPI integration user and Grant the SFAPI Update Assessment Report permission to the SFAPI integration user, and Grant API User Login permissions for the SFAPI integration user.
  • Set the API login exceptions under Password & Login Policy Settings>Select the SFAPI integration user>Maximum password age (days): Set this option to -1.

7- Go to Elevatus, click on EVA-SSESS then choose Create Assessment to create a public assessment.

8- Go to manage assessments and click the “Export assessments (SAP)” button.

9- Create an Assessment Vendor using Admin Center>Manage Assessment Vendors

  • Export the Assessment vendor file.

  • Add Assessment Vendor details and Import them using the "Import" option under Manage Assessment Vendors.

10- Import the Assessment Package using Provisioning>company settings>Import/Export Assessment Vendor

11- Add a new "Status" in Edit Applicant Status Configuration.

11- Add the Standard "Assessment" field and define the field permissions.

12- Add "Feature" Permission for assessment integration.

13- Create a New "Email Notification" and Insert "APPLICATION_ASSESSMENT_PROVIDER_URL" Token

13- Create a job requisition in SAP SuccessFactors and fill the assessment association section with the required package from the imported packages.

14- To trigger the assessment, move the Candidate to the "Invite to video interview stage" Status.

15- The System will trigger an email notification to the candidate automatically once a candidate is moved to “Invite to video interview stage” status. Also, Under the Assessment section, the TA team can see the status of the assessment such as Initiated or Initiation Failed.

16- The admin can also check the Audit log to understand the failed assessment details y clicking on the “View” button.

17- The Candidate will receive an email with the assessment URL.

18- Candidates need to provide basic details before starting the assessment.

19- Once the candidate completes the assessment. TA team can access the result under candidate details.

Conclusion

Integrating Elevatus Assessment with SuccessFactors Recruitment marks a significant advancement in the talent acquisition landscape. By combining the strengths of both platforms, organizations can achieve a more efficient, effective, and engaging recruitment process. This integration enhances the recruiter’s ability to make informed hiring decisions and provides a superior candidate experience. Embrace this innovative solution to stay ahead in the competitive job market and secure the best talent for your organization.

Useful Resources:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RECRUITING/2929cc4339964ca7b0db5039a4df768f/0f2d48de0f2b46949a64613496bf38a5.html

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3326977

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3051325

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2343018

entry.title: Re: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?

can anyone from outside of SAP try and use your (onprem) wifi? missing customer get togethers from before the pandemic.

thx, gm

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I have managed to install ABAP Platform Trial into my homelab using the "sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022" image.

However, I cannot make a backup with all my changes since the database is within the image provided by SAP. Wouldn't it be more robust and aligned with best practices if the Database directory was mapped to a persistent directory (via volume mapping in Docker)?

If you agree, which directories should be mapped?

/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02

Any other?

 

Regards,

Joel Frojmowicz

entry.title: Re: The SAP Datasphere Analytic Model
entry.content:
Great write up. Now we are heading into 2025 and so far the Business Builder seems to be still the only way to combine multiple fact sources?

The direction Datasphere is heading is confusing to me, to be honest.

entry.title: New Digital Skills Initiative Applicant
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm a female veteran who is looking to switch my careers mid-life. I'm currently working in healthcare industry, but I'd like to develop skills in technology so I might have better opportunities to move forward. I'm not sure how I can utilize my knowledge in healthcare and technology, but my goal is having a career that let me work from home and have a business trip once in awhile.

P.s. I watched the demo how to register and join the beginner corner but it didn't have student zone section. How can I join this group? @David_Chaviano 

V/r,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
• SAP Managed Tags: SAP Universal ID, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance , FIN Controlling , SAP S/4HANA Finance 

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Eman Kassem  and I am truly excited about the opportunity to join the Digital Skills Initiative. i have been working in linux-plus in Egypt as sap FICO consultant for the past year. Throughout my career, I've recognized the immense value of staying up-to-date with digital advancements and expanding my skill set in this fast-paced world. sharpening my technical expertise and staying competitive in the evolving digital landscape. I am confident that this initiative will not only enhance my current capabilities but also empower me to contribute more effectively to the digital transformation efforts within my organization and beyond.

Thank you for considering my application, and I look forward to the possibility of joining this incredible learning journey. Please let me know how I can proceed with the registration process.
I really need this certificate and i can't afford it so it would be appreciated if you support.

Best regards,

@David_Chaviano 

Labels: Certification 


 Tags:  About David_Chaviano - SAP Community

entry.title: HANA Express Docker on Ubuntu
entry.content:
Hello SAP HANA Express Team,

I'm running the ABAP Developer Trial which comes with a built-in HANA DB on my Ubuntu 22.04.5 LTS without any issues. Today I've tried to run start saplabs/hanaexpress with the following (already adjusted command):

docker run -p 39013:39013 -p 39017:39017 -p 39041-39045:39041-39045 -p 1128-1129:1128-1129 \
-p 59013-59014:59013-59014 \
-v /home/gwolf/projects/hxe:/hana/mounts \
--ulimit nofile=1048576:1048576 \
--sysctl kernel.shmmax=1073741824 \
--sysctl net.ipv4.ip_local_port_range='40000 60999' \
--sysctl kernel.shmall=8388608 \
--name hxe \
saplabs/hanaexpress:latest \
--passwords-url file://hana/mounts/hxe.json \
--agree-to-sap-license
but I got this error:
======== Starting HANA container run script ========
Started at: Wed Sep 18 12:11:29 UTC 2024
Script parameters: --passwords-url file://hana/mounts/hxe.json --agree-to-sap-license
HANA version: 2.00.076.00.1705400033
WARNING: Unsupported Linux kernel version 5.15. Supported are 3.12 and 4.4+.
ERROR: Unknown host '45677630bc78'. The container must be started with one of these host names:
ERROR: 	2d54a5c2223f
I found also #4628 describing the same issue. Is there any hope that Ubuntu will be supported? It should not be an issue as the HANA for the ABAP Developer Trial works just fine.
Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Advice on Where to Begin with Learning Journeys
entry.content:
Hi!

I am a new college grad, starting my journey with SAP 😊. I am working as a business architect, currently focusing on the finance portion of my company's upgrade from ECC to S4H. 

I need advice on what learning journeys to complete. Something that starts from the very beginning of what SAP is, and then something later that focuses on Financial Accounting.

Thank you so much!

entry.title: How to have a fixed bin for empty HU with specific HU type
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to have a fixed bin in my EWM warehouse for empty HUs. Let's say bin has a capacity of 3, if one HU is picked out of that bin, next HU should be fetched out of my warehouse.

Next is - it is not really fixed, operator needs to change HU type that should be on that bin. 

And - all HU types have the same packaging material.

So I need something like /SCWM/BINMAT, but for HU types. Is this possible with standard EWM functions?

Thanks

Michael

entry.title: Re: How to have a fixed bin for empty HU with specific HU type
entry.content: For sure - I need a replenishment then as well

entry.title: Re: crystal report footer blank space at end
entry.content:
Download SP 36 from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Here's a Blog I wrote to upgrade your project:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

entry.title: SAP TechEd Virtual & TechEd on Tour (SAUG-x)
entry.content:
SAP TechEd Virtual 2024 is scheduled for Oct 8 & 9. The session catalog has been released and its time to build your agenda. This is available for all and a fantastic opportunity to learn new things.

Check out the session catalog https://www.sap.com/events/teched.html

For those who are planning to be at Melbourne, SAUG & SAP are partnering to present an in-person experience for the Developer community. This very special gathering in Melbourne full of unique sessions for in-depth learning, hands-on labs to develop practical skills and deep insights to give you an edge. Draft agenda is out. https://www.saug.com.au/WhatsOn/SAUG-x2024

See you there.

entry.title: Trying to close a non-commercial PO. I get the error message "balance is not zero".
entry.content: Trying to close a non-commercial PO. I get the error message "balance is not zero".  I understand this is because I need set the delegation flag, but it can't because I get the error message that BRRQ status is active. How do I fix this issue if I can't go to QA12?

entry.title: Re: Memory Forecast for SAP HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace
entry.content: What if a system is in the "Already reached" status? I want a forecast but it does not give one. What can be done for it to show a prediction?

entry.title: Error When Staging for an order
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I'm getting this error when I'm trying to stage for the manufacturing order in /scwm/stage. Could you guys please help me out with this error.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Notes on installing SAPGUI for Java for macOS
entry.content:
@francisco_silva and anyone else who is interested in using a more modern Abap source code editor from within SAPGUI for Java (typically on a MacBook though SAPGUI for Java is also released for Windows and Linux)... it seems that in Q4 of 2024, SAP are going to release a new major version (8.10) which will have this kind of source code editor:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-gui-for-java-8-10-on-the-horizon/ba-p/13667349 

"Source Editor Control
 
Although only relevant for ABAP developers and despite the availability of the Eclipse-based ABAP development tools, this is undoubtedly the most desired feature missing in the SAP GUI for Java. The rapidly growing popularity of macOS computers, which are also used by developers, made it necessary to go to the considerable effort of developing such a specialised component."
 
The article has more details and screenshots from their pre-release version. So am looking forward to trying the 8.10 version when it is released.

entry.title: Re: Returnable Packaging
entry.content: Hi Guys, Will it work with EWM also?

entry.title: SAP Fiori development newsletter September 2024 (issue #30)
entry.content:
September marks the start of autumn, which means back to school for our kids and conference season for us. Both are focused on learning new things, which is so important in our industry where technology changes so quickly.

Some events to look for include Devtoberfest, SAP TechEd, and the next SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Heidelberg.

If you want to meet with fellow developers and the SAP engineers who build our professional development tools, I encourage you to join our monthly SAP Fiori elements and SAP Fiori tools roundtable group. Our next meeting is Wednesday, October 9, 2024. You can also email me if you would like an invitation.

If you prefer to receive this in your inbox, please subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter.

Development News

How to create an SAP Fiori elements application from within ADT

This integration helps bridge the gaps between the different development environments that are currently required to build an SAP Fiori elements app and deploy it on an ABAP stack.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-create-a-sap-fiori-elements-application-from-within-adt/ba-p/13797232

Side Effects in SAP Fiori elements apps: triggering actions and updating data in your unmanaged RAP application Side Effects refer to system behaviors where a user’s action, such as modifying a field or performing a specific task, triggers changes in other parts of the user interface. For instance, updating a field might automatically adjust related fields or data sections. These changes are crucial for maintaining data consistency and ensuring that the user interface reflects the latest information.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/side-effects-in-fiori-triggering-actions-and-updating-data-in-your/ba-p/13851571

How to mass upload from a spreadsheet file into an SAP Fiori app in SAP BTP ABAP Environment

All SAP Fiori elements apps provide a download to Excel as a standard feature. However, only a few apps support uploading from a spreadsheet. In this series, you will see how to upload records from a spreadsheet file.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-mass-upload-from-a-spreadsheet-file-into-an-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-btp/ba-p/13785946 (part 1)
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-mass-upload-from-a-spreadsheet-file-into-an-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-btp/ba-p/13800792 (part 2)

Smart and flexible: sap.ui.mdc library is released for productive use in SAPUI5 1.124

sap.ui.mdc helps to build enterprise-ready smart controls or applications, no matter which back-end technology and data protocol you are using. It offers a flexible and comprehensive reuse approach with implementable delegates for the sap.ui.mdc controls. Using specific protocols like FHIR or even a plain REST service is now possible without having to start from scratch.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/smart-and-flexible-sap-ui-mdc-released-for-productive-use/ba-p/13793439

SAP BTP ABAP environment – release 2408

A summary of updates to ADT, CDS, RAP, and other innovations for ABAP developers.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-abap-environment-release-2408/ba-p/13801154

Events

Devtoberfest starts September 23

Devtoberfest aims to capture the experience of live pre-conference events, like SAP InnoJam of years’ past. It officially kicks off the SAP TechEd season. Devtoberfest takes some of the best aspects of the traditional hackathon type event, such as learning by building something, but opens the experience to the entire community and spreads across multiple weeks to better accommodate everyone’s busy schedules.
https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest-blog-posts/devtoberfest-2024-welcome/ba-p/9358

SAP TechEd runs October 8-9

User experience and app dev sessions at SAP TechEd 2024

For 2024, SAP TechEd is virtual once again, with lots of great sessions grouped into six content tracks. If you prefer in-person learning, SAP TechEd on Tour consists of companion events around the world in collaboration with regional user groups (ASUG, SAUG, UKISUG, and DSAG).

Here are some sessions on UX and application development.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/user-experience-and-app-dev-sessions-at-sap-teched-2024-virtual/ba-p/13864322

SAPUI5 at SAP TechEd: tailor your UI with SAPUI5 in SAP Build Code

Discover the latest on SAPUI5 development in SAP Build Code. Learn how to realize clean core extensibility with new capabilities and how you can future-proof your app with new tools and best practices. Understand why SAP Web Components are strategic and how you can benefit from using them.
See AD101 in the session catalog

Full TechEd session catalog

Content tracks – we recommend you check the application development and automation tracks

SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Heidelberg on November 19

After our successful events in Dublin and Chicago, we are bringing SAP Fiori Innovation Day back to Europe. The next one will be in Heidelberg on November 19. By attending this event, you will learn:

  • SAP’s UX strategy and how it is evolving
  • Recent UX innovations that fulfill the promise of the intelligent, collaborative enterprise
  • Making SAP Fiori work for you – finding the apps you need and adapting them to your business requirements
  • Building apps using the latest tools and technologies – the same ones SAP uses to build apps for SAP S/4HANA
  • How to move your organization forward, including how to take advantage of AI for developing applications

Register today:
https://events.sap.com/eur/sap-fiori-innovation-day-heidelberg-2024/en/home

Summary of SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Chicago

If you want to gain a sense of what we do in SAP Fiori Innovation Day and what you might learn, you can read the summary of our event in Chicago.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-innovation-day-in-chicago-sap-fiori-fundamentals-ux/ba-p/13797787

Tutorials

openSAP content has moved to the learning.sap.com platform

Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps
https://learning.sap.com/courses/developing-and-extending-sap-fiori-elements-apps

Developing an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on a CAP OData V4 Service
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-an-sap-fiori-elements-app-based-on-a-cap-odata-v4-service

Getting Started with Creating an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on an OData V4 RAP Service

This new learning journey guides you through building SAP Fiori elements applications from scratch using a RAP OData V4 service.
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-creating-an-sap-fiori-elements-app-based-on-an-odata-v4-rap-service

Adapting the UI in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Screen Personas

https://learning.sap.com/courses/adapting-the-ui-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-using-sap-screen-personas

Tutorial: Key User Adaptation for SAPUI5 applications

To extend SAPUI5 applications, SAPUI5 Flexibility offers capabilities not only for developers, but also for key users and end users using simple visual / WYSIWYG tools.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-tutorial-mission-key-user-adaptation-for-sapui5-applications/ba-p/13639694

Tutorial: SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects in SAP Business Application Studio are not new. What is new, is the support for SAP S/HANA Cloud. This enables developers to enhance SAPUI5 applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with features that were previously only for on-premise customers. See this blog post linking to an extensive, end-to-end tutorial:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extending-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-using-sapui5-adaptation-projects/ba-p/13607813

Back issues from the past year

SAP Fiori development newsletter July 2024 (issue #29)

SAP FIori development newsletter #28 (May 2024)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #27 (March 2024)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #26 (January 2024)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #25 (November 2023)

entry.title: Re: Testing deadline monitoring in workflow
entry.content: Nice post

entry.title: Re: PoC with SAP Business Network Purchase Order PDF with Document Information Extraction (AI Servic
entry.content:
We have developed a POC (now confirmed into a business case) where we send PO to supplier via output control as soon the PO document is created. Later when the supplier processes this order and sends back the PO confirmation via an email to our Shared mailbox sitting over a virtual machine, SBPA job (DOX service) extracts the PO confirmation information (such as quantity, price, delivery date, shipping terms , payment terms etc.) , converts it to a JASON format and shares this information to backend SAP system, to ultimately update the PO confirmation. 

can’t wait to convert it to a blog and post it.

entry.title: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

When working with SAP HANA Calculation Views perfromance optimization, how do you figure out where the performance is slow or what is causing it? 

I am currently learning on this concept but always my question is, how do we actually know where the performance is poor? On what basis can we say that the performance of a calculation view is bad?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud SAP HANA, express edition 

Best Regards,

Vikram Kamvar

entry.title: Looking for a use case using AI/ML offerings powered by BTP.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am looking for a blog, reference document which can help me find a potential use case using AI ML offerings over BTP platform. I have already tried PO and PO confirmation POCs using DOX service. Could you please help me find an another typical use case in a business where we can leverage these AI ML service offerings of BTP and and make a real Impact.

#AIML #SBPA #BTP

entry.title: Re: Can't find source table 'junit_props' in database.
entry.content: You made my day

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation – SMTP Mail Destination using Microsoft 365 email provider
entry.content:
A common use case for SAP Build Process Automation is sending emails to end users when workflow tasks are assigned, or triggering emails to the workflow initiator when a task is approved or rejected. To use Email step in your process, you need to have an active mail server configured, and a destination must be set up in the SAP BTP subaccount where the Build Process Automation subscription is available.

SAP Help documentation to create SMTP mail destination in SAP BTP can be found here: Configuring SMTP Mail Destination.

There are various SMTP server options available for handling outgoing emails. A common customer question is how to configure this with Microsoft and what steps are involved.

Note: Microsoft 365 no longer allows connections to Outlook 365 via Basic Authentication. As a best practice, it's recommended to use more advanced protocols like OAuth2 for enhanced security.

More information - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/legacy-protocols/how-to-authenticate-an-imap-pop-smtp-application-by-using-oauth

In this blog post, I will guide you through the process of setting up an SMTP server with Microsoft and integrating it with SAP Build Process Automation using OAuth2Password.

The configurations on the Microsoft side must be carried out by your organization’s Microsoft Administrators.

Pre-requisites

  1. A tenant in Microsoft Azure Entra ID(Active Directory).
  2. A user who has an active Outlook 365 subscription in the same tenant.

Configurations to be completed in Microsoft Azure

Step 1: Use your Admin account to sign in to your Azure tenant at https://portal.azure.com. Upon logging in, you will be taken to the Microsoft Azure Home Page, as shown below.

Step 2: In the search bar at the top, type "Microsoft Entra ID" and select it from the list of results to proceed.

Step 3: Navigate to Manage and then select App Registrations.

Step 4: Select New Registration.

Step 5: Provide a suitable name for your application and select "Accounts in any organizational directory (Any Microsoft Entra ID tenant - Multitenant)." You can then proceed to register your application.

The app is now registered in Microsoft Entra ID and is displayed as shown below. Make sure to save the Application (client) ID and Directory (tenant) ID, as they will be needed later.

Step 6: Under Manage, navigate to Certificates & Secrets.

Save the Application (client) ID, which we will refer to as <Application (client) ID>. This will be used during the configuration of the Destination in SAP BTP.

Save the Directory (tenant) ID, which we will refer to as <Directory (tenant) ID>, and it will be used when configuring the Destination in SAP BTP.

Step 7: Generate a new client secret.

Enter a description and set the expiry date according to your organization’s policy. If there is an end date, ensure you generate a new secret before the old one expires and update any references to the old secret.

Save both the Secret ID and Value for future use, although only the Value will be needed. We will refer Value as <Secret Value> which will be used while configuring Destination in SAP BTP.

Step 8: Next, navigate to API Permissions.

Select "Add a permission".

Select “Microsoft Graph”.

Choose Delegated permissions.

Under Select permissions, search for SMTP.Send and choose the permission as shown below.

The permissions are displayed as shown below. You can either keep the User.Read permission or remove it. Additionally, you will need to grant admin consent for the user.

Step 9: As we are using OAuth2Password, Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) needs to be disabled.

Note: This will not be required once Authentication Type OAuth2ClientCredentials is supported. 

In the Microsoft Entra Admin Center, go to Identity, then Protection, and select Conditional Access.

Go to Policy Snapshot

Snapshots below

Choose Multifactor Authentication for Microsoft partners and vendors, then under the Enable Policy section, switch the toggle to Off and click Save.

Repeat the same process for all the available default policies.

Note: Your organization may have additional custom policies that require special attention. Ensure that you follow your organizational policies, as they may differ from the default settings.

Step 10: Navigate to the Exchange Admin Center at https://admin.exchange.microsoft.com, go to Settings, then MailFlow, and uncheck the option for “Turn Off SMTP Auth protocol for your organization.”

Step 11: Go to https://admin.microsoft.com, then navigate to Users > Active users, and select the user that will be configured for outgoing emails.

Ensure that "Authenticated SMTP" is enabled.

Configurations to be completed in SAP BTP

Create a Destination with name sap_process_automation_mail in the BTP subaccount where SAP Build Process Automation is subscribed.

Name

sap_process_automation_mail

Type

MAIL

Description

Destination to Microsoft SMTP Mail Serer

Proxy Type

Internet

Authentication

OAuth2Password

User

<Email ID of the User>

Password

<Password of the User>

Client ID

<Application (client) ID>

Client Secret

<Secret Value>

Token Service URL

https://login.microsoftonline.com/<Directory (tenant) ID>/oauth2/v2.0/token

Note: <Application (client) ID>, <Secret Value> and <Directory (tenant) ID> is from steps 6 and 7.

Additional Properties

mail.smtp.auth

true

mail.smtp.auth.mechanisms

XOAUTH2

mail.smtp.from

<User from which you want to send Email> - Can be any Email ID

mail.smtp.host

smtp.office365.com

mail.smtp.port

587

mail.smtp.ssl.enable

false

mail.smtp.starttls.enable

true

mail.smtp.starttls.required

true

mail.transport.protocol

smtp

scope

https://outlook.office.com/SMTP.send

To perform the test, log in to SAP Build Process Automation and navigate to Control Tower > Mail Server.

Note: If the above screen is not visible and you have correctly configured everything in BTP destinations, the sign-in to Microsoft Entra ID likely failed. Refer to the Troubleshooting section below for guidance on checking errors.

Send a Test Email

Enter the Email ID to which you would like to Send a Test Email.

 

Troubleshooting

There are couple of places where you can troubleshoot and find what is going wrong.

  1. SAP BTP subaccount Destination Logs – This can be challenging as end users do not have direct access to Destination Logs. A support ticket to SAP must be raised to get the logs.
  2. Microsoft Azure Entra ID Tenant – This can be found under Monitoring > Sign-in Logs.

Filter using the Application Name created for Microsoft Entra ID Tenant.

entry.title: Make surface regions in line chart borderless SAP WEBI
entry.content:
Hi, 

On SAP WEBI 4.3, area chart does not allow any unstacking, and that's why I go for line chart but selecting regions as 'surfaces' (example as image) which gives me something similar with area chart but both start on the same axis instead of stacking. However, the black border of the areas are not wanted. How can I remove the border? or change the style or color of the border to make it disappear? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi Joel,

of course that would be perfect. But the problem is that then the DB Content would need to be provided either seperately or extracted on the first start.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Getting error when truing to consume SAP VIM API '/OPT/VAS4_ILC_QUERY_CDS'
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to consume SAP VIM API '/OPT/VAS4_ILC_QUERY_CDS' using Postman. I am using the below url to call the API

https://<host>/sap/opu/odata/OPT/VAS4_ILC_QUERY_CDS/PONumberResults?$format=json

Getting below error message

{
"error": {
"code": "BW_BICS_EQ/150",
"message": {
"lang": "en",
"value": "ValueHelp request for PONumberResult without 'select' not supported"
},
"innererror": {
"application": {
"component_id": "BC",
"service_namespace": "/OPT/",
"service_id": "VAS4_ILC_QUERY_CDS",
"service_version": "0001"
},
"transactionid": "3D8CB95ED32A01E0E0066C052602C9DB",
"timestamp": "",
"Error_Resolution": {
"SAP_Transaction": "",
"SAP_Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
},
"errordetails": [
{
"code": "BW_BICS_EQ/150",
"message": "ValueHelp request for PONumberResult without 'select' not supported",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"transition": false,
"target": ""
}
]
}
}
}
Can some one help me fix this.
 
Thanks,
Sagar

entry.title: Re: File download no longer working in CAP 8
entry.content: I'm not suggesting that you should use the plugins. But test them with a small CAP 8 applicaiton and see if there downloads work. And if yes check their coding.

entry.title: Percentage by dimensions on chart SAP WEBI
entry.content:
Hi, 

In cross table, we can have 1 dimension on top and 1 dimension on side, so that the function of percentage([measure name];Col) would distribute by column (example as image 1, 2024-09 has 1 in total). However, when it is using a vertical (or horizontal) table, the percentage is always shared among all mix of dimension 1 & dimension 2 (example as image 2, percentage distributed for the entire column 3). Any syntax or operator that can be made good use to give the column 3 in image 2 distributed as image 1?

 

Meanwhile, if I need it on a chart, how to make it distributed month by month (ideally to be something like image 3)?

 

image 1:

 

image 2:

 

 

image 3:

entry.title: Re: can we have trail version to connect to cloud connector for on-premise system
entry.content: What is your question? Please note that its trial and not trail.

entry.title: Re: Getting error when i am trying to build mbt
entry.content:
Does your mta.yaml before all contains a:

cds build --production

?

entry.title: Display Authorization Trace for Multiple Users
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

Is it possible to activate authorization trace for multiple users in S/4HANA cloud public edition?

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Display Authorization Trace for Multiple Users
entry.content:
Dear customer,

The authorization trace can only be generated for one single user at a time.

As a matter of fact, as described in the documentation, even for a single user, it is recommended to define selection criteria in order to limit the data set of the resulting trace.

Check SAP Help Portal | Display Authorization Trace for more information.

 

Please check SAP Note 1515837 for more details regarding submitting new ideas to future implementations. 

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
My name is Margarita from Nicaragua in Central America. I work  and enjoy SAP . The bussiness area was telecommunications and Healthcare.   I would like the opportunity  to have this opportunity.

Sincerely,

entry.title: Re: REV.EXE file usage in SAP work directory
entry.content:
Hello,

I could not find references of a "rev.exe" file delivered by SAP.

The screenshot also shows that the file was located at the "work" folder, not at the "exe" folder of the SAP instance.

And just because a file is at the SAP folder it is not necessarily legit. Anything can drop files at any folder...

I would suggest caution as this could really be a virus or similar.

Regards,

Isaías

entry.title: Consecutive Payment and Document Numbering
entry.content:
Hi, Sap Community

1. In the review of the consecutive of the payments it is evident that the system has the same consecutive for the collections (customer payments) and for the disbursements (payments to suppliers), is it possible that a different consecutive can be assigned for each case or a prefix?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Employee and Org Replication using BIB from EC to SAP
entry.content: Excellent work!! Thanks a lot. Very useful.

entry.title: Controlling internal movement of an expired Batch and blocked stock type- BAdI /SCWM/EX_WHO_DSTGRP
entry.content:
Requirement: During internal transfer posting of a Full HU (/SCWM/ADHU) or a Product transfer( /SCWM/ADPROD) using Fiori or RF transaction, there shall be a capability of stopping HU/Product movement based on certain condition.

 Business Conditions:

  • Don't allow internal movement of HU/Product if Batch is expired
  • Don't allow internal movement of HU/Product if stock type is Blocked.

Problem Addressed/ Standard Scenario: There is no standard functionality available in SAP which allows to control the movement of HU/Product based on above condition.

Solution: SAP EWM offers a BAdI /SCWM/EX_WHO_DSTGRP which can be used to put a validation on lot of business conditions. This blog will showcase a solution how to this BADI. There could be many usage of this BAdI, and primarily this is used for changing the consolidation group of WT during WO creation.( This BAdI gets triggered every time when each WT is assigned to WO).However, this is extremely critical BAdI in EWM and its usage is at lot of places before WO generation. In this blog, the business conditions of stopping internal movement of Expired & Blocked stock would be controlled using the BAdI  /SCWM/EX_WHO_DSTGRP.

Replication Steps: During Bin to Bin transfer from Component warehouse to Production supply( Adhoc), system should forbid the movement of HU reading the condition from BAdI.

Using RF: Create & Conf ADHOC HU

Using /SCWM/ADHU:

 

Using RF: Create & Conf ADHOC Product

Using /SCWM/ADPROD:

BAdI details: The BAdI uses interface /SCWM/IF_EX_WHO_DSTGRP using importing parameter IT_TO which allows to read HU WT( FLGHUTO), Warehouse Process Type( PROCTY=3), Stock Type( CAT=BB), Batch( CHARG), Shelf Life Expiration Date( VFDAT< current date), Product(MATID) & Warehouse Task(TANUM). Reading the above attribute before WT creation( HU or Product), a validation is put inside the BAdI.

Other BAdIs: Customer can also use /SCWM/EX_CORE_CR_INT_CR. This BAdI is specifically designed for Internal Process and customer can put validation. This BAdI is called during every WT creation.
In this BAdI, you can read the Batch ID, HU,VFDAT, Stock type and abort WT creation using parameter setting to ET_BAPIRET. This would work both HU WT and Adhoc Product WT.

Thanks for reading. All test is performed in S/4HANA 2022 Embedded EWM.

The blog is co-authored by @prem_swaroop

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi Gregor,

Why??? I've a few dozen docker containers running on my homelab and all of them that uses a DB I've mapped a volume outside the container.

In this case, when we run the container we just need to map the volume to get access to the database.

Here is an example of a docker-compose file I'm using (except for the bold part):

services:
  server:
    stop_grace_period: "3600s"
    sysctls:
      - kernel.shmmax=21474836480
      - kernel.shmmni=32768
      - kernel.shmall=5242880
      - kernel.msgmni=1024
      - kernel.sem="1250 256000 100 8192"
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 1048576
        hard: 1048576
    stdin_open: true
    tty: true
    container_name: a4h
    hostname: vhcala4hci
    ports:
      - 3200:3200
      - 3300:3300
      - 3601:3601
      - 8443:8443
      - 30213:30213
      - 50000:50000
      - 50001:50001
    volumes:
      - /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/license/sap:/opt/sap/ASABAP_license
      - /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/license/hdb:/opt/sap/HDB_license
      - /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/HDB:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02
    image: sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022
    command: -skip-limits-check -agree-to-sap-license

I'm using UnRAID OS so the volumes are all mounted using my fastest drive (cache SSD) at:

/mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/

I already have the license directories mounted correctly. I've already tested and it's working.

My question is regarding the database, so even if I stop the container, remove it and then create another container pointing to the same volume, the application should consider the already in place database files. Will this work?

For example, I have a website that uses Wordpress. The database and theme files are stored using a external volume. When I want to update the Wordpress version, I simply pull the new version of the official Wordpress container and voila. The application is updated and my website is stills runs normally.

This philosophy works for every other container I have, but I don't know if this will work with SAP as it's way more complex than other containers I use.

Regards,
Joel Frojmowicz

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
services:
    server:
        stop_grace_period: "3600s"
        sysctls:
            - kernel.shmmax=21474836480
            - kernel.shmmni=32768
            - kernel.shmall=5242880
            - kernel.msgmni=1024
            - kernel.sem="1250 256000 100 8192"
        ulimits:
            nofile:
                soft: 1048576
                hard: 1048576
        stdin_open: true
        tty: true
        container_name: a4h
        hostname: vhcala4hci
        ports:
            - 3200:3200
            - 3300:3300
            - 3601:3601
            - 8443:8443
            - 30213:30213
            - 50000:50000
            - 50001:50001
        volumes:
            - /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/license/sap:/opt/sap/ASABAP_license
            - /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/license/hdb:/opt/sap/HDB_license
	    - /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/HDB:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02
        image: sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022
        command: -skip-limits-check -agree-to-sap-license

As this code block doesn't work with formating inside, the bold part should be the following line:

- /mnt/cache/appdata/sap_abap/HDB:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02

entry.title: Two processing rules would match a bank statement item, what happens then?
entry.content:
Question was raised by a colleague, what would happen if I have two rules in my system, processing rule with id 872 and two conditions, like company code and house bank account. 

And another one with id 873 with two conditions, like company code and external transaction.

Now we import a bank statement, and it contains an item which would fulfills both rule conditions. 

What happens now with the bank statement item?

entry.title: Re: Two processing rules would match a bank statement ite...
entry.content:
If the action of both rules would be the same for instance Action Type is "Post to G/L" account and both would post to the G/L Account 89201112. Then randomly the first rule would be used and the posting will take place.

 

But if the action is different, one is for instance a posting to a G/L Account, the other wants to clear an invoice (Action Type "Clear in Sequence"). In such a case, nothing happens. You'll see a message in the application log, if you open the bank statement item, that no action was executed, as we have multiple rules that match this item.

entry.title: Re: A Beginner's demo for pushing data from SAP CPI to SOLACE
entry.content: The URL is working now. I was able to download it and test the scenario. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to Make the Transition from SAP GTS 11.0 to SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello GRC Experts, is there any SAP guide/document on the details steps for the scenario below

Scenario C - Option 1 - Already SAP GTS 11.0 on SAP HANA database 

Few links I found all have only the High level details and I am looking for the document on the steps on how to calculate the package in maintenance planner and generate the stack file since there is mention of uninstalling component and it was mentioned in another blog that the uninstall need to be selected in maintenance planner when generating the stack file. Please help share details if anyone has already done it. Thanks

Gabriel

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: How can I use this queues in an iFlow? With EM Standalone you can consume them with HTTPS or AMQP Connectors.

entry.title: Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content: Hi, in regards to point 5 - how do I "ensure that no postings are made; only the allocation is updated"? My system automatically posts when using FBRA. FBD1 is for setting up a recurring document so not sure how that is relevant here?
